message:
🐛 Fix analytics noise filter tests failing due to cross-test throttle state (#10126)

The error throttle maps (recentErrorEmissions, pageErrorCounts) added in
PR #10092 are module-level singletons that persist across vitest runs.
When fake timers reset between tests, the throttle window comparison
(Date.now() - lastEmit < 60s) incorrectly blocks the baseline error
emission in subsequent tests.

Fix: export _resetErrorThrottles() for test isolation and call it in
each describe block's beforeEach.

Fixes #10123

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
